author: Charley C.
pros: It integrates well into our business model
cons: I really don't have any negative feedback

author: Elizabeth A.
pros: I actually do not use the software directly through Microbilt but instead through our loan management software. I like how it's integrated so we are not having to use multiple systems. It seems very easy to use from our Customer's side of view and they have many banks, including local banks, to choose from.
cons: The readability of the transactions / banking could be better. If it pointed out loans for us at a glance that'd be helpful. Also the ability to refresh the data, for collections or re-loaning purposes, would be nice.

author: Kristina O.
pros: Ease of use for staff members since it's integrated with our account management software.
cons: Not being able to determine if a client's bank participates without frustrating the client. It does not confirm account registration which would help in potential identity theft cases.

author: Ebenezer O.
pros: Instant verification of bank accounts ensures that funds are sent to the right accounts.
cons: The product is good in design and in its utilization.

description: It's been wonderful I haven't had any had any real issues with it.
author: CRYSTAL B.
pros: No more waiting to print out your statements and waiting for them to go through them we don't have to now because it's done electronically
cons: Sometimes your papers better but if you have any overdraft fees they show up right away which u may not qualify for whatever your applying for
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ryan Z.
pros: It’s a nice feature to have whenever customers can’t give you your bank information
cons: Doesn’t work with all banks especially credit unions etc.

author: Cedric Toussaint G.
pros: Très bon logiciel de gestion financière et bancaire
cons: Je ne lui trouve aucun inconvénient je le recommande
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
